repair.reason: inferred allowed node type from node name

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: 'error', reason: 'invalid_input', required: ['tenant_id','tenant_type','signup_event_id'] } }}

parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="{{$env.PROJECT_ROOT || '/data/aries-platform-bootstrap'}}"
KEY="{{$json.signup_event_id}}"
TENANT="{{$json.tenant_id}}"
EVENT_DIR="$ROOT/generated/draft/idempotency"
mkdir -p "$EVENT_DIR"
MARKER="$EVENT_DIR/${KEY}.json"
if [ -f "$MARKER" ]; then
  echo "{\"duplicate\":true,\"idempotency_key\":\"$KEY\",\"tenant_id\":\"$TENANT\",\"marker_path\":\"$MARKER\"}"
else
  echo "{\"duplicate\":false,\"idempotency_key\":\"$KEY\",\"tenant_id\":\"$TENANT\",\"marker_path\":\"$MARKER\"}"
fi

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: 'duplicate', idempotency_key: $node['Normalize Input'].json.signup_event_id, tenant_id: $node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_id, message: 'Duplicate signup_event_id ignored' } }}

parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="{{$env.PROJECT_ROOT || '/data/aries-platform-bootstrap'}}"
TENANT="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_id}}"
TYPE="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_type}}"
INPUT="$ROOT/generated/draft/${TENANT}-input.json"
OUT="$ROOT/generated/draft/$TENANT"
mkdir -p "$ROOT/generated/draft"
printf '{\"tenant_id\":\"%s\",\"tenant_type\":\"%s\"}\n' "$TENANT" "$TYPE" > "$INPUT"
node --experimental-strip-types "$ROOT/templates/generate_tenant_workspace.ts" --input "$INPUT" --out "$OUT" > "$ROOT/generated/draft/${TENANT}-generator-result.json"
echo "{\"status\":\"generated\",\"tenant_id\":\"$TENANT\",\"artifact_path\":\"$OUT\"}"

set -euo pipefail
ROOT="{{$env.PROJECT_ROOT || '/data/aries-platform-bootstrap'}}"
TENANT="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_id}}"
TARGET="$ROOT/generated/draft/$TENANT"
REPORT="$ROOT/generated/draft/${TENANT}-validation-result.json"
node --experimental-strip-types "$ROOT/validators/tenant_provisioning_workspace_validator.ts" --target-root "$TARGET" --report "$REPORT" > /tmp/${TENANT}-validator-output.json || true
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const r=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8'));process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:r.status,failed_checks:r.failed_checks,defect_count:(r.defects||[]).length,report_path:process.argv[1]}));" "$REPORT"

set -euo pipefail
ROOT="{{$env.PROJECT_ROOT || '/data/aries-platform-bootstrap'}}"
TENANT="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_id}}"
KEY="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.signup_event_id}}"
DRAFT="$ROOT/generated/draft/$TENANT"
VALID="$ROOT/generated/validated/$TENANT"
MARKER_DIR="$ROOT/generated/draft/idempotency"
mkdir -p "$ROOT/generated/validated" "$MARKER_DIR"
rm -rf "$VALID"
cp -R "$DRAFT" "$VALID"
printf '{\"duplicate\":true,\"idempotency_key\":\"%s\",\"tenant_id\":\"%s\",\"promoted_path\":\"%s\"}\n' "$KEY" "$TENANT" "$VALID" > "$MARKER_DIR/${KEY}.json"
echo "{\"status\":\"promoted\",\"promoted_path\":\"$VALID\"}"

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: 'success', tenant_id: $node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_id, tenant_type: $node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_type, signup_event_id: $node['Normalize Input'].json.signup_event_id, validation_status: 'pass', promoted_path: JSON.parse($node['Promote Workspace'].json.stdout).promoted_path } }}
={{ { status: 'validation_failed', tenant_id: $node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_id, signup_event_id: $node['Normalize Input'].json.signup_event_id, repair_routed: true, repair_response: $json } }}
={{ { status: 'error', reason: 'invalid_input', required: ['tenant_id','tenant_type','signup_event_id'] } }}
